content:
You are running a legal benchmark task under Psionic control.
Use only the listed tools and produce outputs intentionally.

Tool policy:
- allowed tools: write, validate_deliverables
- network allowed: false
- source artifacts read-only: true
- submit by returning JSON: {"action":"submit","deliverables":["path"]}.

Tool descriptions:
- write: Write a UTF-8 output file under the workspace or output root.
- validate_deliverables: Check required workspace/output deliverables for existence, readability, media type, and hash.

Benchmark operating protocol:
- Validate required output paths with validate_deliverables before submitting.
- Final submission may be rejected until required inventory, source inspection, evidence rows, deliverable validation, and self-check notes are present.

Module instructions:
- This is a public Harvey training-slice run. It is not a retained benchmark score.
- The runner must not and will not add text to your output. Any score comes only from what the model writes.
- Write output.md under root output, validate output.md, then submit it.
- Do not include Harvey criterion IDs, rubric labels, C-IDs, checklist IDs, or scoring tokens.
- If you did not actually inspect a source document, say that plainly as a source limit instead of pretending.
- Use plain JSON tool messages exactly like {"tool":"write","input":{...}} and {"tool":"validate_deliverables","input":{...}}; the runner will execute only JSON you wrote.
- Blueprint work-product scaffold: task `MFN Waterfall Analysis and GP Recommendation Memo for Fund IV Side Letters` is analyze work in funds-asset-management. Do not copy rubric text. Build the memo around product requirements: source map; material facts from visible source names; legal/business issues; analysis; recommendation; risks; assumptions; and source limits. Produce an issue map, explain the governing legal/business standard, compare source facts to that standard, and end with recommendations and open questions. Visible source names include: capital-commitment-schedule-and-fee-model.xlsx, gp-side-letter-policy-memorandum.docx, limited-partnership-agreement-excerpts.docx, side-letter-compendium.docx, side-letter-terms-tracking-spreadsheet.xlsx.

Review the attached fund documents and prepare an MFN election analysis and recommendation memo for the GP. Output: `output.md`.

Source artifact tool paths:
- artifact.source.funds.asset.management.analyze.mfn.waterfall.documents.capital.commitment.schedule.and.fee.model.xlsx: capital-commitment-schedule-and-fee-model.xlsx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet)
- artifact.source.funds.asset.management.analyze.mfn.waterfall.documents.gp.side.letter.policy.memorandum.docx: gp-side-letter-policy-memorandum.docx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document)
- artifact.source.funds.asset.management.analyze.mfn.waterfall.documents.limited.partnership.agreement.excerpts.docx: limited-partnership-agreement-excerpts.docx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document)
- artifact.source.funds.asset.management.analyze.mfn.waterfall.documents.side.letter.compendium.docx: side-letter-compendium.docx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document)
- artifact.source.funds.asset.management.analyze.mfn.waterfall.documents.side.letter.terms.tracking.spreadsheet.xlsx: side-letter-terms-tracking-spreadsheet.xlsx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet)


Practice-area issue checklist:
- Identify parties, dates, governing documents, requested output, and assumptions.
- Separate document-backed facts from legal conclusions and cite each material fact.
- Track ambiguities, missing documents, and conflicts between source materials.
- Compare draft terms against instructions, term sheets, prior versions, and controlling source documents.
- Apply the practice-area standard issue-spotting checklist before drafting the final deliverable.


Deliverables:
- deliverable.output_md at output.md: Plain Markdown legal work product for local no-cheat scoring

missing_steps: validate required output paths with validate_deliverables: output.md
include a final self-check note covering evidence, deliverables, and uncited or unsupported claims
